properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Here in this house of the great King We come together now to worship Him This house is built on Christ our rock Cannot be shaken, cannot be shaken

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God is awesome in this place We sense His presence as we sing His praise There is power here for a miracle Set the captives free, make the broken whole

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: God is awesome, He's so awesome God is awesome in this place

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I've found where I belong, I'm a living stone In this house I will grow I've found where I belong, I'm a living stone In this house we will grow

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I've found where I belong, I'm a living stone In this house I will grow I've found where I belong, I'm a living stone In this house I will grow

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: There is power here for a miracle Set the captives free and the broken whole

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: God is awesome, He's so awesome God is awesome, He's so awesome God is awesome, He's so awesome God is awesome in this place
